title: WITH TOOL Compatible Toner Cartridge 59A CF259A (59X CF259X) 3000 pages for HP printers M304a M404dw M404dn M404n M428dw M428fdw M428fdn M428m M406dn M430f M304 M404 M428 M406 M430 NO CHIP
features: 【Compatible Printer Model】 HP LaserJet Pro M304 M304a M404dw M404dn M404n M404, HP LaserJet Pro MFP M428dw M428fdw M428fdn M428m M428, HP LaserJet Enterprise M406 M406dn MFP M430 M430f printer series.

【What You Will Get】 Include a set of chip removal tools and 1 pack compatible toner cartridge 59A CF259A black no chip. Page Yield – Standard capacity 3000 pages at 5% coverage, A4 paper, letter. (ISO/IEC standard).

【High Performance】 We provide the best printing effect for users like the original toner. The image resolution is clear, and has strong layers. The copies look beautiful. The color is uniform, clear and comfortable.

【Quality Material】 We use high quality toner from Japan, the toner is pure, fresh, natural and odorless. Every toner cartridge is strictly inspected with industry quality and control processes to ensure a premium print quality.

【ISO Quality Factory】 Our toner cartridges are manufactured in the factory that meets ISO 9001, ISO 14001 and ROHS environmental standards. We specialize in producing compatible toner cartridges with over 20 years of technical experience.
